Protected Member Functions inherited from llvm::LiveRange
void append (const LiveRange::Segment S)
 Append a segment to the list of segments.

Detailed Description

A live range for subregisters. The LaneMask specifies which parts of the super register are covered by the interval. (

See also
TargetRegisterInfo::getSubRegIndexLaneMask()).

Definition at line 582 of file LiveInterval.h.
